content: Thank you! Why did you say not to follow flares? Are his guides not good?
This one here? It's randomized
Check the 3rd bottom line
They are extremely biased, take everything with a grain of salt

You can follow it as a baseline for a general guide, but don't take everything that he says as literal or at the very least don't take it too seriously as the advice that he will be giving is not completely accurate to the actual game
For example, Mouchette is not a C-Tier Character and is instead the most effective low investment Main Carry DPS from E0-2 and at E3 competes with Kath (E3) in Damage Output
Oh, oops.
How good is Tulu?

Ultra is not the worst Realm, but is instead the Realm with the best Supports available at large. Clementine is not bad even from Arc 1 and is also one of the most effective Supports from low investment (E0-3) going into the later Game
Best Buffer for Tentacle Damage
Key Support in GMurphy (E3-OE) Full Lemurian Team Comps
Hmm, how important is OE for GMurphy? Also what does Lemurian Team Comp mean?
Is helot alt good?

Without it, she's less than half as Effective as both a Carry and as a DPS

Lemurian is a Faction that grants Buffs to eachother when paired together, making it the least versatile Selection of Characters even compared to Poison Team Comps
Yeah with Kath & Mouch, they make the Trinity of the most effective Main Carry DPS Characters at E3
Should i use it in this loadout?
For reference, these 5 are the only Lemurian Awakeners available and you're generally pairing the first 3 together for Full Lemurian Team Comps with the last 2 as the 4th Slot or Flex
Why does this game keep leading me to unversatile OE needing team compsToT I already have Doll: Inferno to deal with.
No, both GHelot & Mouch are very greedy and want to Retain their Cards on Hand and want to eat a lot of Resources (Aliemus, Arithmatecia, etc)
Hhm I have Farox so 2 out of 5

Yeah, you can probably run those 2 together with GMurphy but don't expect anything too special. Your only saving grace would probably be that both Myriam & Tulu are available in the Aequor / Blue Standard Character Banner (albeit, at very low odds)
Yeah, that's... hella unfortunate
Ok
No Castor/Pollux?
It's the price I pay for liking the Silent...

Pollux really wants to have OE and at E3 also wants to have Castor in their Team, making him less versatile. At E3 Castor can work as DPS, but deals less Damage when compared to Kath, Mouch and GHelot as he'll mainly be dealing DoT
A price I honestly wouldn't want to be paying for myself either
It's very rough...
Well, doesn't GHelot kinda want Thais as well?

She can make do without Thais and instead use the C7 Posse, and using that argument you could also say that Kath "kinda wants to be ran together with Clem, Tinct and Horla" or that "Mouch absolutely needs to be ran as a Duo together with base Helot". But what I'm telling you here is that they are the most Effective DPS, not that they are the most Versatile. Those are 2 different things
I'm not the one who started debating versatility
I just thought e3 pollux with castor was as good as those 3
Didn't mean to start a fight
Yeah alright, but I'm not gonna be here together with you wasting my time over pointless debates like <@850363603018186802>
Good for you
Later
HUH
pollux doesn't need castor at oe
but he does if e3
Yeah, thats what I said
Yeah, thats what I said
Congrats
Yeah, thats what I said
You can get lucky yeah
Yeah, thats what I said
Yeah, thats what I said
I was listening to I'm blue as a catalyst to get Miryam
But I'm not complaining
Murphy is good for getting rid of your Sacrife stacks, you can run her together with GMurphy, Faros and Goliath
If you'd like
OHHH, I still need to get Goliath but at least he has higher chance of appearing
Goodluck dude
Thanks a thousand!!!
Bro
Murphy dupe

E1? That Enlightenment is actually really good for her, lets you have on demand Vulnerable / Weakness (as the Card will Retain on your Hand rather than Discard at End of Turn) which also applies to every Target on screen
I was just asking if pollux e3 with castor was weaker than ghelot/kathi/Mouchette

Your questions (when read as text) can come off as judgemental and rhetorical, making them sound offensive. It also doesn't help that while I was writing Paragraphs, you responded with a short question both times
That's not what I meant, and I'm sorry it sounded like that
Unless you explicitly ask whether Castor & Pollux are weaker than Kath, Mouch and GHelot
I won't have the context to answer your question
Allg, I was being sensitive too
Mb man
All good
Kath/Mouch/Cantena/Pollux/Fauxborn are all really amazing damage dealers
Weaker or stronger depends on context of the team AND enemy
But they are all top tier
Upper echelon

I meant to ask if we're comparing their bis teams, like ghelot thais aigis helot, Kathi ultra, Mouchette with whoever is best for her, would castor pollux comp be comparable to these in performance or would still be worse, everyone at E3
Oh, and Potrait/Ring is another thing to consider
Tldr: All strong and good. Better or not all depends on context.
Same tier
*relatively*

Yeah, they'd all be comparable in their effectiveness when ran in BiS Teams. But, at the time, I was thinking of how effective can they be when ran on their own and not always together with their BiS Supports and didn't put them all to scale in my hand

Like Kath when ran in Ultra Comps is very good, but will not always be needed (unless you wanna A5) as Kath can easily handle A3-4 on her own with random Awakeners. The same can be said for Mouch, as well as GHelot. Whereas Pollux struggles a bit compared to the 3 of them when not ran together with at least one each of somebody to Tank and somebody provide Support. And that while Castor is effective, he's not much of a Main Carry, but more of a Shielder & DoT DPS which makes his Damage pale in comparison
Yeah, that's fair. It's also hard to rate units in a vaccum. Even ignoring the portraits, I'm sure some will perform better under certain conditions than others
Yeah, I understand why you consider him a step below the others, it's kinda like their ceilings are similar but polluxs floor is lower

Like, yes, the majority of the Damage that both GHelot and Pollux deals is derived from Bleed. But the deciding factor between the two is that compared to Pollux, GHelot can provide for you Sustain where he cannot in it that she is Caro (= Crimson Furnace, Healing) and her Flails will also heal you based on loss Health
Pollux can neither Shield nor Heal, which means that he needs somebody else to Tank for him

It's also more of a given that due to the nature of all of them being DPS Characters, they'll naturally need a Support to either provide Arith / Aliemus, as well as amplify their Damage (Strikes = Mouch, Amplify = Pollux) in some sort of way

Also, while Mouch can neither Shield nor Heal either. She instead benefits alot from building Death Resistance, which will ofcourse raise your Survivability (as well as your Damage Output, Crit Rate is raised depending on how much of it you had built only on her.) Which makes the need of a Tank for her, not as necessary as it is for Pollux
Yeah, Mouchette seems to be the easiest to get a decent team around, easiest to play, and best at e0-e2
Is that why people like flares say ultra is the worst realm? The other 3 help with survivability, ultra doesn't
Yeah, like Kath, she can also simply be played together with Ramona & Ogier and a plus one (Karen for Kath, Lotan for Mouch) which makes Team Building for the two of them relatively much easier
Pretty much
Makes sense, hadn't thought about it that way
That's also a very old take, which is unique specifically to Flares (who is now the only one left that still uses it)
How far from these would GMurphy e3 be? Like can she comfortably clear a5, or is it unreliable without OE?
Unreliable, she also desperately wants to be ran together with Lemurian Faction Awakeners
Makes her less versatile and harder to actually build a Team around comfortably
True, despite 2 of them being standards, 2 are limiteds and are better options afaik
Maybe gtulu changes that and she becomes his support
Yeah, Myriam & Tulu are far better options to run together with GMurphy (which them both her 2 BiS Supports) than Faros & Goliath

Doesn't change much, as he'll fairly likely will also be a Lemurian Faction Awakener and provide Buffs when ran together with them. Unless they give him the Lemurian Faction moniker on his Details, not provide a Faction Bonus for other Lemurian Awakeners ran together with them
Tulu is the worst lemrurian
Goliath gives 10x str
And Faros draws
Could at least make the team better at e0-e3 I guess
Well, I'm heading off. Gnight, and thank you for your help! 😁
Alright, man. Goodnight, and you're welcome

it depend on wat supports u bring
if u got enough crit rate from wheels and supports then go crit dmg
if not then go crit rate
her dmg is from 1 big hit missing crit on that could mean failed run

not mandatory would say

Thais is more generically useful than Murphy is.
